info.name: POWER LAW Digital API - Defense Ready
info.description: Defense-ready Postman collection. Run top to bottom: Health, Owner login, create staff one by one, then inquiries/cases/groups/jobs. Before using: docker compose up -d postgres redis; npx prisma migrate deploy; npm run db:seed; npm run dev.

item.name: 2. POST /auth/login - Director login with temp password

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', json.access_token); pm.collectionVariables.set('refreshToken', json.refresh_token); pm.collectionVariables.set('directorId', json.user.id); }

item.name: 3. POST /auth/login - Lawyer login with temp password

exec: if (pm.response.code === 200) { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', json.access_token); pm.collectionVariables.set('refreshToken', json.refresh_token); pm.collectionVariables.set('userId', json.user.id); }
const json = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('accessToken', json.access_token); pm.collectionVariables.set('refreshToken', json.refresh_token);
const json = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(json.role).to.eql('director'); pm.collectionVariables.set('directorId', json.id);
pm.test('password reset by manager', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.eql(200); });

body.raw:
{
  "full_name": "Public Client",
  "email": "public.client@example.invalid",
  "phone": "+70000000000",
  "category": "family",
  "description": "I need legal help with a family law matter and would like to receive a consultation from the firm."
}

exec: if (pm.response.code === 201) { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('caseId', json.case_id); }

item.name: 8. POST /cases/:id/documents - Upload encrypted file to DB

exec: if (pm.response.code === 201) { const json = pm.response.json(); pm.collectionVariables.set('documentId', json.id); pm.expect(json.sha256_hash).to.have.length(64); pm.expect(json.encrypted).to.eql(true); }
